<!-- Describe what this PR does in 1-2 sentences. -->

Closes #<!-- issue number, e.g. Closes #42 -->

## 🔄 Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply: -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] 🚀 New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that causes existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 🎨 UI / styling improvement
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 📖 Documentation update
- [ ] 🧹 Chore (dependency update, tooling, config)

## 🧪 Testing

<!-- How did you test this? What scenarios did you verify? -->

- [ ] I tested this locally with `pnpm run dev`.
- [ ] I confirmed the production build passes with `pnpm build` (zero TypeScript errors).
- [ ] I tested across multiple themes (Minimal, Dark, Gradient, Terminal).
- [ ] I tested on mobile viewport sizes.
- [ ] I verified relevant accessibility (keyboard navigation, labels).

---

## ✔️ Contributor Checklist

- [ ] My branch is up to date with `main`.
- [ ] My code follows the TypeScript + Tailwind conventions in this project.
- [ ] I have added comments/docs where the logic is non-obvious.
- [ ] My commit messages follow the Conventional Commits format (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.).
- [ ] I have read and agree to the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
